speaker: CAESAR
text: He calls me “boy,” and chides as he had power

speaker: CAESAR
text: To beat me out of Egypt. My messenger

speaker: CAESAR
text: He hath whipped with rods, dares me to personal combat,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Caesar to Antony. Let the old ruffian know

speaker: CAESAR
text: I have many other ways to die; meantime

speaker: MAECENAS
text: When one so great begins to rage, he’s hunted

speaker: MAECENAS
text: Even to falling. Give him no breath, but now

speaker: MAECENAS
text: Make boot of his distraction. Never anger

speaker: CAESAR
text: Know that tomorrow the last of many battles

speaker: CAESAR
text: We mean to fight. Within our files there are,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Of those that served Mark Antony but late,

speaker: CAESAR
text: Enough to fetch him in. See it done,

speaker: CAESAR
text: And feast the army; we have store to do ’t,

speaker: CAESAR
text: And they have earned the waste. Poor Antony.
